source: Agent 14 — Children's curriculum designer, Rhema debate April 2026

questions.question: Who said, 'Here I am, send me!' to God?
questions.explanation: Isaiah was brave! When God asked who would go, he raised his hand right away to serve Him.

questions.question: Who said, 'Let the little children come to me'?
questions.explanation: Jesus loves kids! He told His friends to let children come close so He could bless them.

questions.question: Who said, 'I can do all things through Christ'?
questions.explanation: Paul wrote this from jail! He knew Jesus gives us strength even when things are hard.

questions.question: Jesus turned water into ______.
questions.explanation: At a wedding, Jesus did His very first miracle and turned jars of water into yummy wine.

questions.question: David used a ______ to beat Goliath the giant.
questions.explanation: Little David trusted God more than his size. One smooth stone from his sling won the fight!

questions.question: God made the world in ______ days.
questions.explanation: God made everything in six days, then rested on the seventh. Sky, sea, animals, and us!

questions.question: Which happened FIRST in the Bible?
questions.explanation: On the very first day, God said 'Let there be light!' This was before any story or person.

questions.question: Which happened FIRST?
options: Jesus was born in a stable
questions.correctAnswer: Jesus was born in a stable
questions.explanation: Jesus came as a baby first! All His miracles happened after He grew up.

questions.question: What animal swallowed Jonah?
questions.explanation: The Bible says a great fish God sent! Jonah prayed inside for three days and God saved him.

questions.question: What animal talked to Balaam on the road?
questions.explanation: God opened the donkey's mouth to warn Balaam! The donkey saw an angel Balaam couldn't see.
